name: Koulourakia (Special Occasion Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. In a bowl, combine the flour and cinnamon and set aside.
3. In a medium bowl, beat the oil and sugar with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Dissolve the baking powder and baking soda in the brandy, then add to the oil mixture.
4. Gradually add the flour until the dough is soft but not sticky. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth.
5. Pinch off pieces of dough the size of small walnuts and form into desired shapes.
6. Sprinkle with sesame seeds and place 1 inch apart on greased cookie sheets.
7. Bake for about 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
